transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I had surgery here last week — appendix removal. I wanted to ask about the wound dressing. It looks a little different today.
AGENT: I hope you're recovering well. Can you tell me your name and procedure date?
CALLER: Manoj Thakur. Surgery was on the 17th.
AGENT: Thank you, Manoj. I'm sorry to hear you're concerned about the wound site. I have to be honest — post-operative care guidance and wound assessment is something I really shouldn't advise on from this line, as it requires a clinical eye.
CALLER: Is it serious? Should I be worried?
AGENT: I truly can't say — I wouldn't want to either alarm you or dismiss something important. This is exactly why I want to get you to the right person. Our nursing or surgical team can assess your situation properly. Let me connect you to our staff right now.
CALLER: Okay, please hurry.
AGENT: Absolutely. Holding the line — let me connect you to our staff immediately.
